forbidden.name: no-components-import-api-route
forbidden.comment: UI components should not import Route Handlers (BFF layer) directly. Use fetch via lib/api/ instead.

forbidden.name: no-hooks-import-api-route
forbidden.comment: Hooks should not import Route Handlers directly. Use lib/api/ fetch functions instead.

forbidden.name: no-client-import-server-db
forbidden.comment: Client-side code (components/hooks) must not import DB layer. DB access belongs in Route Handlers only.

forbidden.name: no-client-import-downstream
forbidden.comment: Client-side code (components/hooks) must not import Downstream clients. Downstream access belongs in Route Handlers only.

forbidden.name: no-client-import-session
forbidden.comment: Client-side code (components/hooks) must not import session. Session management belongs in Route Handlers/middleware only.

forbidden.name: no-pages-import-server-lib-directly
forbidden.comment: Page components should delegate server operations to Route Handlers, not call DB/Downstream directly.
